task_description: Code quality, test coverage, reflection and tidy-up: refactor CdkBaseStack for modularity, optimize test performance with shared fixtures, add CI coverage reporting, improve code documentation, and add reflections to EXPERIMENT.md

verification.summary: Build succeeds with 0 errors/warnings. All 129 C# tests pass (execution time reduced from 18s to 6s via shared fixtures). All 19 Python tests pass. CDK synth succeeds for default, dev, and prod environments. Test quality verified - tests exercise real CDK synthesis and validate actual CloudFormation output.
